concerns.analysis: The output JSON is missing a massive portion of the source document. Specifically, Sections 3 through 10 are replaced by a placeholder stating '13 sections omitted for token budget'. This encompasses the majority of the nomination form, including the physical description (Section 7), the statement of significance (Section 8), and the bibliography (Section 9). Additionally, an explicit section at the end of the array indicates that pages 21-31 are unavailable. While footnotes for these pages are
concerns.source_pdf_quote: The source document contains 11 numbered sections across 63 pages of text, plus maps and photos. Sections 3 (p. 1) through 10 (p. 59) contain the primary historical and architectural data of the nomination.
concerns.output_quote: The JSON sections array contains only Sections 1, 2, and parts of 11 (Additional Documentation). It includes placeholders: '{"_omitted": "13 sections omitted for token budget"}' and 'Content from pages 21-31 could not be converted.'
concerns.location: JSON 'sections' array, between element indices for Section 2 and 'Additional Documentation', and at the end of the array.

concerns.analysis: The heading hierarchy in the output JSON is incorrect. According to the instructions, H1 should be the document title. In the output, the document title 'NATIONAL REGISTER OF HISTORIC PLACES' is assigned Level 3 (H3) and is nested as a subheading within the first section titled 'NORTH CAROLINA STATE HISTORIC PRESERVATION OFFICE'. concerns.output_quote: { "type": "heading", "level": 3, "text": "NATIONAL REGISTER OF HISTORIC PLACES", "id": "heading-1" } ... { "type": "heading", "level": 3, "text": "High Top Colony Historic District", "id": "heading-2" }
